summary: Recent Ifo values: peaked Aug 2025 at 88.8, drifted to 87.6 in Dec 2025 and Jan 2026. Monthly std ~0.65. Recovery expected in 2026 but tariff threats and trade uncertainty weigh on sentiment.
content:
Key data points:
- Jan 2026: 87.6 (unchanged from Dec 2025)
- Range last 5 months: 87.6-88.4
- Monthly change std: 0.64
- Recent 6-month mean change: -0.15/month
- Analysts expected 88.2 for Jan (missed)
- ZEW sentiment surged to 59.6 (4-year high) in Jan 2026
- Trump tariff threats: 10% from Feb 1, potentially 25% in June
- Germany GDP forecast: 1.1-1.4% growth in 2026
- New CDU/SPD coalition government formed May 2025, fiscal expansion underway
- €500bn infrastructure fund and defense spending planned
